54:
Aha, that's it! “My dear, sweet beloved. Let me be the guardian to your ruins of Ronka, now and forevermore.”
Do you think she would accept such a proposal?

58:
Ah! I have it now! “The ruin that is your love has sunk to the bottom of my heart. And there it shall remain for all time.”
The perfect proposal, don't you think?
